name: codex-agent-skills
description: A compact personal product-building stack for Codex, spanning contextual next steps, project status, product discovery, prototypes, engineering delivery, QA, review, and launch.

interface.shortDescription: Compact lifecycle workflows for building lovable, viable, well-engineered apps with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native product-building stack with a deliberately small public skill surface: contextual next action, project status/scaffold/repair, product discovery, prototypes, specs, planning, implementation, tests, QA, review, simplification, and ship decisions. Detailed guidance lives in references so agents load only the context they need.
defaultPrompt: Use next to do the next normal thing.
Use project-status to scaffold this project.
Use project-status to tell me what phase we are in.
